Main Page

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Welcome to Wikipedia, a collaborative project to produce a free and complete encyclopedia in every language. This is a local reader for Simple Wikipedia. Anyone, including you, can search and read articles from this collection. Use the search box above or browse by category below.

The content of Wikipedia is covered by the GNU Free Documentation License, which means that it is free and will remain so forever. See wikipedia:Copyrights for the details and open content and free content for background.
